text: No, I don't wanna No, I don't wanna be the baby. Please don't make me eat your passy. No. Put it in your mouth. No, we don't share. We don't share things in our mouths, okay? I'll hold on to your passy. I'm not a baby. You are a baby. I'm not a baby. You are a baby. You are a baby. You're my baby. You are my baby. You're my baby.
